calendar.matters:
MOTION / Ntc Of Mo & Mo For Apportionment Proceeding And For An Order To Distribute Settlement Funds
Off Calendar Aug-17-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Motion for Apportionment Proceeding and for an Order to Distribute Settlement Funds hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Dave Davenport.
Jenelle Moulyn, Esq. for Plaintiffs: Anna Roach, et al.
No appearance by the Plaintiffs.
After hearing the testimony of counsel and considering of the filed Declarations, moving papers and evidence presented, the Court grants the Motion for Order to Distribute Settlement Funds.
Counsel to prepare Order.
Aug. 17, 2007
Order granted and signed by Comm. Kaplan, see scanned doc. for details.
